zh.title: 帕伊西奥斯长老预言全集 - 阿索斯山圣僧的15条预言与验证 | Elder Paisios Prophecies
zh.description: 希腊东正教圣僧帕伊西奥斯长老（1924-1994）留下的15条预言完整收录，涵盖土耳其与君士坦丁堡、俄土战争、欧盟命运、电子身份证与兽印、末世征兆与灵性衰退等领域。2015年被封圣，是现代希腊最受尊敬的圣徒。
zh.keywords: 帕伊西奥斯长老,帕伊西奥斯预言,阿索斯山,希腊圣僧,君士坦丁堡,Elder Paisios,预言,东正教,圣山预言
zh.ogTitle: 帕伊西奥斯长老预言全集 | Elder Paisios Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 希腊东正教圣僧帕伊西奥斯长老留下的15条预言完整收录与验证分析。涵盖地缘政治、宗教与灵性等领域。

en.title: Elder Paisios Prophecies - 15 Predictions from the Saint of Mount Athos (1924-1994) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Elder Paisios of Mount Athos (1924-1994), canonized Greek Orthodox saint, left 15 prophecies about Turkey, Constantinople, Russia, European Union, electronic ID marks, and signs of the end times. Complete archive with verification.
en.keywords: Elder Paisios,Paisios prophecies,Mount Athos,Greek Orthodox saint,Constantinople prophecy,Turkey prophecy,end times,Orthodox prophecy
en.ogTitle: Elder Paisios Prophecies - The Saint of Mount Athos
en.ogDescription: 15 prophecies from Elder Paisios of Mount Athos (1924-1994), canonized Orthodox saint. Complete archive with real-world verification.
en.twitterDescription: 15 predictions from Elder Paisios, the canonized Greek Orthodox saint of Mount Athos. Topics include Turkey, Constantinople, and end times signs.
